title: Add simple IRC messenger
body:
Add a naive python script that's able to connect to IRC and send a
single line of text to the #podman channel.  Call this script when
a flake is detected in `contrib/python/podman/test/test_runner.sh`
so somebody can access the VM and take a look.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

This is what showed up in IRC:

```
<podbot_49941568> Cirrus-CI full_vm_testing on ubuntu-18 successful for https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1648
```

@baude @mheon @jwhonce PTAL, this one is ready.

LGTM
How do we fix the tests?

@baude @mheon: Something changed in the podman build code.  The error below is coming from the go code.

======================================================================
ERROR: test_build (test.test_images.TestImages)
----------------------------------------------------------------------
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/contrib/python/podman/podman/libs/images.py", line 130, in build
    result = podman.BuildImage(config)
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 84, in _wrapped
    return self._call(method.name, *args, **kwargs)
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 141, in _call
    (message, more) = self._next_varlink_message()
  File "/usr/lib/python3.6/site-packages/varlink/client.py", line 111, in _next_varlink_message
    raise e
varlink.error.VarlinkError: {'parameters': {'reason': 'error creating build container: error reading "/tmp/podman.9RA17nRGEs/crio/vfs-containers/f499a497265d1ea2b11950b709a2ba9ca444e6aa4f7ae0185305c0cb9268f2d4/userdata/buildah.json": open /tmp/podman.9RA17nRGEs/crio/vfs-containers/f499a497265d1ea2b11950b709a2ba9ca444e6aa4f7ae0185305c0cb9268f2d4/userdata/buildah.json: no such file or directory'}, 'error': 'io.podman.ErrorOccurred'}

@jwhonce @rhatdan:  This PR adds IRC notification machinery ***and*** bothers us on IRC when ``cirrus + ubuntu`` fails in python-podman (only).  However, it seems the main problems there are known and more reproducible.  So I think I should remove the python-podman IRC nagging and just leave this PR for the machinery.
